name: ericts-projected-shadow
title: Projected Shadow
author: EricTS UI contributors
description: Separates a supplied mark into target, contact, and projected layers that gather through controlled state or fine-pointer hover.

changes: Repointed the shared class-name helper import to the copied support file beside the component.
Raised reduced-motion selector specificity so active and hovered layers cannot restore transition duration.

modifications.change: Changed the class-name helper import from the upstream application alias to a source-local relative path.
modifications.reason: Keep the shadcn payload closed and installable without importing the upstream application's site utilities.

modifications.change: Made the reduced-motion transition-duration rule at least as specific as the active and hover duration rules.
modifications.reason: Prevent the active 360 ms duration from winning the cascade when the user requests reduced motion.
